title: Assertion failure in InstanceGraph analysis
body:
**Test commit**
[417a5112947d9889cad54cb5b2110b37978b86b8](https://github.com/llvm/circt/commit/417a5112947d9889cad54cb5b2110b37978b86b8)

**Description**
The `--sv-trace-iverilog` pass crashes when the input module contains no hardware modules.

**Steps to reproduce**
- Minimal MLIR program (test.mlir)
```
"builtin.module"() ({
  "func.func"() <{function_type = () -> (), sym_name = "foo"}> ({
    "func.return"() : () -> ()
  }) : () -> ()
}) : () -> ()
```

**Command**
```
circt-opt --sv-trace-iverilog test.mlir
```

**Output**
```
circt-opt: /workdir/sources/circt/lib/Support/InstanceGraph.cpp:230: FailureOr<llvm::ArrayRef<InstanceGraphNode *>> circt::igraph::InstanceGraph::getInferredTopLevelNodes(): Assertion `!candidateTopLevels.empty() && "if non-cyclic, there should be at least 1 candidate top level"' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/circt and include the crash backtrace.
Stack dump:
0.      Program arguments: /workdir/builds/circt/bin/circt-opt --sv-trace-iverilog test.mlir

Aborted (core dumped)
```
